steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM debian:oldstable-slim

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install dependencies required for building Arclight
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
        openjdk-21-jdk-headless \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory to project root
WORKDIR /arclight

# Copy Gradle wrapper and sources
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source (mirrors CI build commands)
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Expose typical Minecraft port for server consumers
EXPOSE 25565

# Run the server jar produced by the Gradle build
CMD ["bash","-lc","java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar build/libs/*.jar nogui"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /arclight

# Copy Gradle wrapper and project files
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Runtime image
FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Create non-root user
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

WORKDIR /home/arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs/ /home/arclight/build/libs/

RUN chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight/build/libs
USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

CMD ["bash","-lc","java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar /home/arclight/build/libs/*.jar nogui"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Copy project and wrapper
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Copy project and wrapper
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install git for Gradle build
USER root
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates curl unzip

# Copy project and wrapper
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install git for Gradle build
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git ca-certificates curl unzip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Initialize a git repository in build context to satisfy Gradle's versioning if .git is missing
RUN git init \
    && git config user.email "ci@example.com" \
    && git config user.name "Docker Builder" \
    && git add -A \
    && git commit -m "Initial commit for docker build" || true

# Copy project wrapper and sources
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install essential tools (git can be used by plugin in Gradle, but we'll avoid relying on it at runtime)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl unzip ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy project files (wrapper and sources)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source (avoid tasks that require network uploads)
RUN ./gradlew clean build -x test --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install essential tools (git can be used by plugin in Gradle, but we'll avoid relying on it at runtime)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl unzip ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create a minimal dummy .git to satisfy Gradle's git usage when a .git directory isn't available in the tarball
RUN mkdir -p .git/refs/heads \
    && printf "ref: refs/heads/main" > .git/HEAD \
    && printf "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" > .git/refs/heads/main

# Copy project files (wrapper and sources)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source (avoid tasks that require network uploads)
RUN ./gradlew clean build -x test --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install essential tools for build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        curl \
        unzip \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy project files (wrapper and sources)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Ensure we have a git repository for Gradle's evaluation if the host tarball doesn't include .git
RUN if [ ! -d .git ]; then git init && git add -A && git commit -m "Docker build commit"; else echo ".git present"; fi

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo "No jar found"; exit 1; fi\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install essential tools for build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        curl \
        unzip \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create a minimal dummy .git to satisfy Gradle's git usage when a .git directory isn't available in the tarball
RUN mkdir -p .git/refs/heads \
    && printf "ref: refs/heads/main" > .git/HEAD \
    && printf "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" > .git/refs/heads/main

# Copy project files (wrapper and sources)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Ensure we have a git repository for Gradle's evaluation if the host tarball doesn't include .git
RUN if [ ! -d .git ]; then git init && git config user.email "ci@example.com" && git config user.name "Docker Builder" && git add -A && git commit -m "Docker build commit"; else echo ".git present"; fi

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo "No jar found"; exit 1; fi\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Arclight
# Stage 1: Build
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /arclight

# Install essential tools for build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        curl \
        unzip \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create a minimal dummy .git to satisfy Gradle's git usage when a .git directory isn't available in the tarball
RUN mkdir -p .git/refs/heads \
    && printf "ref: refs/heads/main" > .git/HEAD \
    && printf "0000000000000000000000000000000000000000" > .git/refs/heads/main

# Copy project files (wrapper and sources)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY . .

RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Ensure we have a git repository for Gradle's evaluation if the host tarball doesn't include .git
RUN printf "Docker build commit" > DOCKER_BUILD.txt \
    && if [ ! -d .git ]; then git init && git config user.email "ci@example.com" && git config user.name "Docker Builder" && git add DOCKER_BUILD.txt && git commit -m "Docker build commit"; else git add DOCKER_BUILD.txt && git commit -m "Docker build commit" || true; fi

# Build the project from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

WORKDIR /arclight

# Create non-root user for runtime
RUN groupadd -r arclight && useradd -r -g arclight -d /home/arclight arclight

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /arclight/build/libs /arclight/build/libs

RUN mkdir -p /home/arclight && chown -R arclight:arclight /home/arclight /arclight/build/libs

USER arclight

EXPOSE 25565

# Startup script to pick the latest jar and run
RUN bash -lc 'cat > /start.sh << "EOF"\n#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=$(ls /arclight/build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo "No jar found"; exit 1; fi\nexec java -Xmx2G -Xms1G -jar "$JAR" nogui\nEOF\nchmod +x /start.sh'

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

1. **Base image mismatch (Steps 1–7)**  
   - **What failed:** `FROM debian:oldstable-slim` couldn’t install `openjdk-21-jdk-headless`; apt didn’t have that package. Later, attempts with `openjdk:21-jdk-slim` and `temurin:21-jdk` also failed because those tags weren’t found on Docker Hub.  
   - **Fix:** Use a verified existing base image — e.g., `eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy` for building and `eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy` for runtime. Always confirm with `docker pull` before writing the Dockerfile.

2. **Unstable JAR selection (Steps 11–13)**  
   - **What failed:** The image build succeeded up to Gradle build, but Dockerfile ran `java -jar $(ls build/libs/*.jar | head -n 1)`, which is nondeterministic if multiple JARs existed.  
   - **Fix:** Explicitly name the expected JAR (e.g., `arclight-${VERSION}-all.jar`) or copy only the desired artifact into the runtime image.

3. **Incorrect newline handling in startup script (Step 15)**  
   - **What failed:** `/start.sh` contained literal `\n` instead of real newlines because the here-doc wasn’t properly formed.  
   - **Fix:** Use a valid shell heredoc without escaped newlines, e.g.:  
     ```dockerfile
     RUN cat <<'EOF' > /start.sh
     #!/bin/bash
     exec java -jar /app/arclight.jar
     EOF
     RUN chmod +x /start.sh
     ```

4. **Gradle build failure (Step 17)**  
   - **What failed:** `./gradlew clean build -x test` exited with nonzero code. Possible causes: missing build deps or network access.  
   - **Fix:** Ensure `git`, `curl`, and `unzip` are installed; set a dummy user if Gradle runs Git commands. Build offline if possible or use `--stacktrace` logs to confirm. Don’t assume network Gradle plugins succeed in container.

5. **Git identity error (Step 21)**  
   - **What failed:** `fatal: unable to auto-detect email address (got 'root@buildkitsandbox.(none)')`.  
   - **Fix:** Add:
     ```dockerfile
     RUN git config --global user.email "builder@localhost" && git config --global user.name "Docker Builder"
     ```

6. **Invalid Gradle task list (Step 25)**  
   - **What failed:** `./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles` failed — these tasks aren’t standard Gradle ones.  
   - **Fix:** Only use tasks known to your `build.gradle` (e.g., `clean build`). Verify with `./gradlew tasks` before codifying them in the Dockerfile.

7. **Build context issues (Step 19)**  
   - **What failed:** Real `.git` directory copied, breaking the dummy Git setup and forcing unwanted network access.  
   - **Fix:** Include `.git` and `.gradle` in `.dockerignore`. Copy only needed source and Gradle wrapper:  
     ```dockerfile
     COPY gradlew gradle/ build.gradle settings.gradle ./
     COPY src ./src
     ```

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install required build tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl unzip git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy Gradle wrapper and project files
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY settings.gradle .
COPY build.gradle .
COPY arclight-common ./arclight-common

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Runtime stage
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy
WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/arclight-common/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to run the first jar found in /app/libs
RUN set -e; \
    mkdir -p /start.sh.d; \
    JAR_FOUND=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); \
    if [ -z "$JAR_FOUND" ]; then echo "No jar found in /app/libs"; exit 1; fi; \
    printf '#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR=\"%s\"\nif [ -z \"$JAR\" ]; then echo No jar found; exit 1; fi\nexec java -jar \"$JAR\" nogui\n' "$JAR_FOUND" > /start.sh; \
    chmod +x /start.sh

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_output:
- Plugins (versions):
  - architectury-plugin 3.4-SNAPSHOT
  - dev.architectury.loom (version from gradle/libs.versions.toml)
  - com.gradleup.shadow 8.3.+

- Top-level project
  - group: io.izzel.arclight
  - version: 1.0.2-SNAPSHOT
  - versionName: feudal-kings
  - gitHash: computed via git rev-parse --short HEAD
  - supportedPlatforms: forge, neoforge, fabric
  - generatedSpigot: io.izzel.arclight.generated:spigot:${libs.versions.minecraft.get()}:deobf
  - Java toolchain: languageVersion 21
  - Repositories (sample):
    - https://repo.spongepowered.org/maven
    - https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots/
    - https://hub.spigotmc.org/nexus/content/repositories/snapshots/
    - https://maven.neoforged.net/releases
    - https://files.minecraftforge.net/maven/
    - https://maven.izzel.io/releases
    - mavenCentral(), mavenLocal()
  - Dependencies (top level): compileOnly libs.lombok, annotationProcessor libs.lombok, compileOnly libs.jetbrains.annotations
  - Tasks:
    - cleanBuild: deletes build/libs directory

- Git helpers
  - getGitHash() runs: git rev-parse --short HEAD
  - gitBranch() runs: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD

- Subprojects (rootProject.ext.subProjects)
  - Plugins applied: architectury-plugin, dev.architectury.loom, ArclightGradlePlugin
  - arclight: mcVersion = libs.versions.minecraft.get(); bukkitVersion = libs.versions.bukkit.api.get(); spigotReversion = libs.versions.spigot.reversion.get()
  - accessTransformer: rootProject.ext.commonProject.file('bukkit.at')
  - extraMapping: rootProject.ext.commonProject.file('extra_mapping.tsrg')
  - Configurations: common (canBeResolved true, canBeConsumed false); shadowBundle (canBeResolved true, canBeConsumed false)
  - Dependencies: minecraft libs.minecraft; mappings loom.layered() with officialMojangMappings() and parchment artifact
  - Java: withSourcesJar()

- Platform projects (rootProject.ext.platformProjects)
  - Plugins: dev.architectury.loom, com.gradleup.shadow
  - loom.accessWidenerPath = root project's commonProject.loom.accessWidenerPath
  - jar.manifest attributes include:
    - MixinConnector: io.izzel.arclight.common.mod.ArclightConnector
    - Implementation-Title: Arclight
    - Implementation-Version: ${p.name}-${libs.versions.minecraft.get()}-${project.version}+$gitHash
    - Implementation-Vendor: Arclight Team
    - Implementation-Timestamp: current timestamp (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)
  - manifest for platformProjects includes Implementation-Version with gitHash
  - manifest for components.java: skip shadowRuntimeElements variants

- Jar
  - jar.enabled = false

- collect task
  - Type: Copy
  - destinationDir: build/libs
  - from outputs:
    - project(':bootstrap').tasks.forgeJar.outputs
    - project(':bootstrap').tasks.neoforgeJar.outputs
    - project(':bootstrap').tasks.fabricJar.outputs

- UploadFiles task
  - Type: UploadFilesTask
  - mcVersion: libs.versions.minecraft
  - version: "${project.version}-${project.ext.gitHash}"
  - snapshot: true if project.version ends with -SNAPSHOT
  - gitHash: project.ext.gitHash
  - branch: gitBranch()
  - inputs: tasks.collect.outputs.files
  - dependsOn: tasks.collect

- Additional: generatedSpigot uses mc version variable; collector pulls outputs from bootstrap jars; bukkit.at and extra_mapping.tsrg paths are used in arclight config.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install required build tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl unzip git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy entire repository
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Runtime stage
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to run the first jar found in /app/libs
RUN set -e; \
    JAR_FOUND=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); \
    if [ -z "$JAR_FOUND" ]; then echo "No jar found in /app/libs"; exit 1; fi; \
    printf '#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR="%s"\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo No jar found; exit 1; fi\nexec java -jar "$JAR" nogui\n' "$JAR_FOUND" > /start.sh; \
    chmod +x /start.sh

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install required build tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl unzip git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy .git metadata is ignored by .dockerignore; but we may still need git to fetch dependencies if not present
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build from source. Use environment variable to allow Gradle to fetch dependencies without git metadata
ARG GRADLE_BUILD_SKIP_GIT=1
RUN if [ "$GRADLE_BUILD_SKIP_GIT" = "1" ]; then export GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1; fi; \
    ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Runtime stage
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to run the first jar found in /app/libs
RUN set -e; \
    JAR_FOUND=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); \
    if [ -z "$JAR_FOUND" ]; then echo "No jar found in /app/libs"; exit 1; fi; \
    printf '#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR="%s"\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo No jar found; exit 1; fi\nexec java -jar "$JAR" nogui\n' "$JAR_FOUND" > /start.sh; \
    chmod +x /start.sh

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

- Version/compatibility notes

steps.tool_input: {"path": "gradlew"}
steps.tool_output_raw:
#!/usr/bin/env sh

##############################################################################
##
##  Gradle start up script for UN*X
##
##############################################################################

# Attempt to set APP_HOME
# Resolve links: $0 may be a link
PRG="$0"
# Need this for relative symlinks.
while [ -h "$PRG" ] ; do
    ls=`ls -ld "$PRG"`
    link=`expr "$ls" : '.*-> \(.*\)$'`
    if expr "$link" : '/.*' > /dev/null; then
        PRG="$link"
    else
        PRG=`dirname "$PRG"`"/$link"
    fi
done
SAVED="`pwd`"
cd "`dirname \"$PRG\"`/" >/dev/null
APP_HOME="`pwd -P`"
cd "$SAVED" >/dev/null

APP_NAME="Gradle"
APP_BASE_NAME=`basename "$0"`

# Add default JVM options here. You can also use JAVA_OPTS and GRADLE_OPTS to pass JVM options to this script.
DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS='"-Xmx64m"'

# Use the maximum available, or set MAX_FD != -1 to use that value.
MAX_FD="maximum"

warn () {
    echo "$*"
}

die () {
    echo
    echo "$*"
    echo
    exit 1
}

# OS specific support (must be 'true' or 'false').
cygwin=false
msys=false
darwin=false
nonstop=false
case "`uname`" in
  CYGWIN* )
    cygwin=true
    ;;
  Darwin* )
    darwin=true
    ;;
  MINGW* )
    msys=true
    ;;
  NONSTOP* )
    nonstop=true
    ;;
esac

CLASSPATH=$APP_HOME/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar

# Determine the Java command to use to start the JVM.
if [ -n "$JAVA_HOME" ] ; then
    if [ -x "$JAVA_HOME/jre/sh/java" ] ; then
        # IBM's JDK on AIX uses strange locations for the executables
        JAVACMD="$JAVA_HOME/jre/sh/java"
    else
        JAVACMD="$JAVA_HOME/bin/java"
    fi
    if [ ! -x "$JAVACMD" ] ; then
        die "ERROR: JAVA_HOME is set to an invalid directory: $JAVA_HOME

Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
location of your Java installation."
    fi
else
    JAVACMD="java"
    which java >/dev/null 2>&1 || die "ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH.

Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
location of your Java installation."
fi

# Increase the maximum file descriptors if we can.
if [ "$cygwin" = "false" -a "$darwin" = "false" -a "$nonstop" = "false" ] ; then
    MAX_FD_LIMIT=`ulimit -H -n`
    if [ $? -eq 0 ] ; then
        if [ "$MAX_FD" = "maximum" -o "$MAX_FD" = "max" ] ; then
            MAX_FD="$MAX_FD_LIMIT"
        fi
        ulimit -n $MAX_FD
        if [ $? -ne 0 ] ; then
            warn "Could not set maximum file descriptor limit: $MAX_FD"
        fi
    else
        warn "Could not query maximum file descriptor limit: $MAX_FD_LIMIT"
    fi
fi

# For Darwin, add options to specify how the application appears in the dock
if $darwin; then
    GRADLE_OPTS="$GRADLE_OPTS \"-Xdock:name=$APP_NAME\" \"-Xdock:icon=$APP_HOME/media/gradle.icns\""
fi

# For Cygwin, switch paths to Windows format before running java
if $cygwin ; then
    APP_HOME=`cygpath --path --mixed "$APP_HOME"`
    CLASSPATH=`cygpath --path --mixed "$CLASSPATH"`
    JAVACMD=`cygpath --unix "$JAVACMD"`

    # We build the pattern for arguments to be converted via cygpath
    ROOTDIRSRAW=`find -L / -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null`
    SEP=""
    for dir in $ROOTDIRSRAW ; do
        ROOTDIRS="$ROOTDIRS$SEP$dir"
        SEP="|"
    done
    OURCYGPATTERN="(^($ROOTDIRS))"
    # Add a user-defined pattern to the cygpath arguments
    if [ "$GRADLE_CYGPATTERN" != "" ] ; then
        OURCYGPATTERN="$OURCYGPATTERN|($GRADLE_CYGPATTERN)"
    fi
    # Now convert the arguments - kludge to limit ourselves to /bin/sh
    i=0
    for arg in "$@" ; do
        CHECK=`echo "$arg"|egrep -c "$OURCYGPATTERN" -`
        CHECK2=`echo "$arg"|egrep -c "^-"`                                 ### Determine if an option

        if [ $CHECK -ne 0 ] && [ $CHECK2 -eq 0 ] ; then                    ### Added a condition
            eval `echo args$i`=`cygpath --path --ignore --mixed "$arg"`
        else
            eval `echo args$i`="\"$arg\""
        fi
        i=$((i+1))
    done
    case $i in
        (0) set -- ;;
        (1) set -- "$args0" ;;
        (2) set -- "$args0" "$args1" ;;
        (3) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" ;;
        (4) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" ;;
        (5) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" "$args4" ;;
        (6) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" "$args4" "$args5" ;;
        (7) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" "$args4" "$args5" "$args6" ;;
        (8) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" "$args4" "$args5" "$args6" "$args7" ;;
        (9) set -- "$args0" "$args1" "$args2" "$args3" "$args4" "$args5" "$args6" "$args7" "$args8" ;;
    esac
fi

# Escape application args
save () {
    for i do printf %s\\n "$i" | sed "s/'/'\\\\''/g;1s/^/'/;\$s/\$/' \\\\/" ; done
    echo " "
}
APP_ARGS=$(save "$@")

# Collect all arguments for the java command, following the shell quoting and substitution rules
eval set -- $DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS $JAVA_OPTS $GRADLE_OPTS "\"-Dorg.gradle.appname=$APP_BASE_NAME\"" -classpath "\"$CLASSPATH\"" org.gradle.wrapper.GradleWrapperMain "$APP_ARGS"

# by default we should be in the correct project dir, but when run from Finder on Mac, the cwd is wrong
if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ] && [ "$HOME" = "$PWD" ]; then
  cd "$(dirname "$0")"
fi

exec "$JAVACMD" "$@"
steps.tool_output:
- Purpose: Unix/Linux shell startup script for Gradle Wrapper. Runs org.gradle.wrapper.GradleWrapperMain with project arguments.

- Key paths and names:
  - APP_HOME: resolved from script location
  - APP_NAME: "Gradle"
  - APP_BASE_NAME: basename of the script
  - CLASSPATH: $APP_HOME/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar

- JVM options:
  - DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS: "-Xmx64m"
  - Final invocation includes -Dorg.gradle.appname=$APP_BASE_NAME and the classpath

- JAVA command selection:
  - If JAVA_HOME is set:
    - Use JAVA_HOME/jre/sh/java if available; else JAVA_HOME/bin/java
    - If JAVACMD is not executable: die with:
      ERROR: JAVA_HOME is set to an invalid directory: $JAVA_HOME

      Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
      location of your Java installation.
  - If JAVA_HOME is not set:
    - Use "java" from PATH
    - If no java command found: die with:
      ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH.

      Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
      location of your Java installation.

- File descriptor adjustment:
  - Attempts to raise max file descriptors on non-Cygwin, non-Darwin, non-nonstop systems; logs warnings if it cannot.

- macOS (Darwin) specifics:
  - Adds GRADLE_OPTS to set dock name and icon: -Xdock:name=$APP_NAME and -Xdock:icon=$APP_HOME/media/gradle.icns

- Cygwin specifics:
  - Converts paths to Windows format and back as needed
  - Performs complex arg translation and reconstruction for the Java command
  - Rebuilds the argument list via a pattern-based cygpath conversion

- Argument handling:
  - save() escapes and formats arguments
  - APP_ARGS contains the sanitized arguments
  - Final parameter assembly via:
    eval set -- $DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS $JAVA_OPTS $GRADLE_OPTS "\"-Dorg.gradle.appname=$APP_BASE_NAME\"" -classpath "\"$CLASSPATH\"" org.gradle.wrapper.GradleWrapperMain "$APP_ARGS"

- Darwin Finder quirk fix:
  - If on Darwin and HOME equals PWD, cd to script directory before exec

- Execution:
  - exec "$JAVACMD" "$@"

- Important error/text references to preserve:
  - ERROR: JAVA_HOME is set to an invalid directory: $JAVA_HOME

    Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
    location of your Java installation.

  - ERROR: JAVA_HOME is not set and no 'java' command could be found in your PATH.

    Please set the JAVA_HOME variable in your environment to match the
    location of your Java installation.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1

FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk-jammy AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install required build tools
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl unzip git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the entire repository (including .git for git-based versioning in Gradle)
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build from source
RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Runtime stage
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime
WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to run the first jar found in /app/libs
RUN set -e; \
    JAR_FOUND=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1); \
    if [ -z "$JAR_FOUND" ]; then echo "No jar found in /app/libs"; exit 1; fi; \
    printf '#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nJAR="%s"\nif [ -z "$JAR" ]; then echo No jar found; exit 1; fi\nexec java -jar "$JAR" nogui\n' "$JAR_FOUND" > /start.sh; \
    chmod +x /start.sh

CMD ["/start.sh"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Architectury Loom plugin not found**  
   - **What happened:** Gradle failed with `Plugin [id: 'dev.architectury.loom', apply: false] was not found in any of the repositories`.  
   - **Cause:** The `settings.gradle` file’s `pluginManagement` section didn’t include all required plugin repositories (Architectury’s plugin repo wasn’t properly referenced).  
   - **Fix:** Ensure the following repositories are present under `pluginManagement.repositories`:  
     ```groovy
     maven { url 'https://maven.architectury.dev/' }
     maven { url 'https://maven.fabricmc.net/' }
     gradlePluginPortal()
     mavenCentral()
     ```
     Verify the plugin version `dev.architectury.loom = 1.9-SNAPSHOT` exists in those repos.

2. **Gradle custom tasks caused build failure**  
   - **What happened:** The Docker build failed at `RUN ./gradlew cleanBuild build collect uploadFiles --no-daemon --stacktrace` because tasks `cleanBuild`, `collect`, and `uploadFiles` were not defined in the project.  
   - **Fix:** Use standard tasks supported by the build. Replace that line with:  
     ```bash
     RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace
     ```  
     Only use defined tasks (verify via `./gradlew tasks` locally if needed).

3. **Gradle wrapper invocation**  
   - **What happened:** Later errors showed Gradle wasn’t executing reliably inside the container.  
   - **Fix:** Ensure the wrapper script has executable permissions:  
     ```dockerfile
     RUN chmod +x gradlew
     ```

4. **Unnecessary environment variables and Git checks**  
   - **What happened:** One build failed on conditionals around `$GRADLE_BUILD_SKIP_GIT` and `GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM`.  
   - **Fix:** Remove conditional Git setup logic unless explicitly required. Use a clean checkout (`COPY . .`) and a direct Gradle build command.

5. **Repository configuration validation**  
   - **What happened:** Gradle couldn’t find plugins or dependencies due to incomplete or outdated repo settings.  
   - **Fix:** Ensure all `repositories` blocks in build scripts include `mavenCentral()` and any custom repos used by Architectury/Forge/Fabric.

6. **Dockerfile simplification**  
   - **What happened:** Multiple Dockerfile rewrites repeated partial build logic.  
   - **Fix:** Use a simple two-stage build:  
     1. **Builder stage** – install `git` and `zip`, set permissions, run `./gradlew clean build`.  
     2. **Runtime stage** – copy output JARs from `/workspace/build/libs` into a slim `eclipse-temurin:21-jre` base.  
     Keep `WORKDIR /app` and `CMD ["java", "-jar", "<your-jar>.jar"]`.

These corrections target the plugin resolution failure, nonexistent Gradle tasks, and inconsistent Docker build steps.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM debian:oldstable-slim AS builder

# Install required tools and JDK 21 (headless) for Gradle build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
        openjdk-21-jdk-headless \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Build workspace
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy Gradle wrapper and project files first to leverage layer caching
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY settings.gradle settings.gradle || true
COPY build.gradle build.gradle || true
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Ensure runtime has CA certificates (for Gradle wrapper fetches if needed)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s
' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM openjdk:21-jdk-slim AS builder

# Install required tools for build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy project files
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs
COPY --from=builder /workspace/gradlew /app/gradlew
COPY --from=builder /workspace/gradle /app/gradle

# Setup runtime environment
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS builder

# Install required tools for build (JDK is provided by the base image)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy project files (order to leverage build cache)
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS builder

# Install required tools for build (JDK is provided by the base image)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Initialize a git repository to satisfy Gradle scripts that expect a git repo
RUN git init \
    && git config user.name "builder" \
    && git config user.email "builder@example.com"

# Copy project files (order to leverage build cache)
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

Actionable summary of the Gradle build script

- Project basics
  - Root group: io.izzel.arclight; root version: 1.0.2-SNAPSHOT; versionName: feudal-kings.
  - Java toolchain: languageVersion 21.
  - Libraries: generatedSpigot = "io.izzel.arclight.generated:spigot:${libs.versions.minecraft.get()}:deobf".
  - gitHash is computed via getGitHash(): git rev-parse --short HEAD; stored in ext.gitHash.
  - gitBranch() uses: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD.
  - Subprojects: platformProjects = arclight-forge, arclight-fabric, arclight-neoforge; common project = arclight-common; subProjects = platformProjects + common.

- Plugins
  - architectury-plugin 3.4-SNAPSHOT (not applied by default)
  - dev.architectury.loom (not applied by default)
  - com.gradleup.shadow 8.3.+ (not applied by default)
  - Per-subproject: apply architectury-plugin, loom, and ArclightGradlePlugin

- Repositories (global)
  - https://repo.spongepowered.org/maven
  - https://oss.sonatype.org/content/repositories/snapshots/
  - https://hub.spigotmc.org/nexus/content/repositories/snapshots/
  - https://maven.neoforged.net/releases
  - https://files.minecraftforge.net/maven/
  - https://maven.izzel.io/releases
  - mavenCentral()
  - mavenLocal()

- Global dependencies (allprojects)
  - compileOnly libs.lombok
  - annotationProcessor libs.lombok
  - compileOnly libs.jetbrains.annotations
  - cleanBuild task: deletes build/libs

- Subproject configuration (each p in rootProject.ext.subProjects)
  - Plugins: architectury-plugin, dev.architectury.loom, ArclightGradlePlugin
  - architectury.minecraft = libs.versions.minecraft.get()
  - loom: silentMojangMappingsLicense()
  - arclight: mcVersion = libs.versions.minecraft.get(); bukkitVersion = libs.versions.bukkit.api.get(); spigotReversion = libs.versions.spigot.reversion.get(); accessTransformer = root/ext/commonProject.file('bukkit.at'); extraMapping = root/ext/commonProject.file('extra_mapping.tsrg')
  - configurations: common (canBeResolved true, canBeConsumed false); compileClasspath, runtimeClasspath, developmentForge, developmentFabric, developmentNeoForge extendFrom common; shadowBundle (canBeResolved true, canBeConsumed false)
  - dependencies: minecraft libs.minecraft; mappings loom.layered() with officialMojangMappings() and parchment("org.parchmentmc.data:parchment-${libs.versions.minecraft.get()}:${libs.versions.parchment.get()}@zip")
  - java: withSourcesJar()

- Platform project configuration (each p in rootProject.ext.platformProjects)
  - Plugins: dev.architectury.loom, com.gradleup.shadow
  - loom: accessWidenerPath = rootProject.ext.commonProject.loom.accessWidenerPath
  - jar manifest attributes:
    - MixinConnector: io.izzel.arclight.common.mod.ArclightConnector
    - Implementation-Title: Arclight
    - Implementation-Version: "${p.name}-${libs.versions.minecraft.get()}-${project.version}+$gitHash"
    - Implementation-Vendor: Arclight Team
    - Implementation-Timestamp: current timestamp
  - components.java: skip variants from project.configurations.shadowRuntimeElements

- Misc
  - jar.enabled = false (top-level)
  - collect task (Copy) collects outputs from bootstrap jars:
    - from :bootstrap forgeJar, neoforgeJar, fabricJar outputs
    - destinationDir = build/libs
  - uploadFiles task (UploadFilesTask)
    - mcVersion.set libs.versions.minecraft
    - version.set "${project.version}-${project.ext.gitHash}"
    - snapshot.set project.version.toString().endsWith('-SNAPSHOT')
    - gitHash.set project.ext.gitHash
    - branch.set gitBranch()
    - inputs.files tasks.collect.outputs.files
    - dependsOn tasks.collect

Key actionable items and values to note
- Git-based versioning: gitHash, gitBranch are computed in Gradle and embedded in Version and manifest.
- Per-subproject and per-platform configuration rely on libs.versions (minecraft, bukkit.api, spigot.reversion, parchment) resolved at runtime.
- Generated spigot coordinates depend on libs.versions.minecraft.get().
- UploadFilesTask uses current branch, gitHash, and collected artifacts for distribution.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS builder

# Install required tools for build (JDK is provided by the base image)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy project files (order to leverage build cache)
COPY gradlew .
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Initialize a git repository to satisfy Gradle scripts that expect a git repo
RUN git init && git config user.name "builder" && git config user.email "builder@example.com" \
    && git add -A && git commit -m "initial commit"

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

FROM gradle:8.3-jdk21 AS builder

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy project files (order to leverage build cache)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common/arclight-common /workspace/arclight-common

# Copy rest of source
COPY . .

# Initialize a git repository to satisfy Gradle scripts that expect a git repo
RUN git init \
    && git add -A \
    && git commit -m "initial commit"

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS builder

# Install required tools and JDK 21 (headless) for Gradle build
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
        openjdk-21-jdk-headless \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the entire project (including .git for git-based hash in Gradle)
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

EXPOSE 25565
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s CMD ["bash","-c","echo ok"]

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

EXPOSE 25565
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s CMD ["bash","-c","echo ok"]

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

  - arclight: mcVersion = libs.versions.minecraft.get(); bukkitVersion = libs.versions.bukkit.api.get(); spigotReversion = libs.versions.spigot.reversion.get(); accessTransformer = rootProject.ext.commonProject.file('bukkit.at'); extraMapping = rootProject.ext.commonProject.file('extra_mapping.tsrg')
  - configurations: common (canBeResolved true, canBeConsumed false); compileClasspath/runtimeClasspath/developmentForge/DevelopmentFabric/DevelopmentNeoForge extendFrom common; shadowBundle canBeResolved/consumed false
  - dependencies: minecraft libs.minecraft; mappings loom.layered() with officialMojangMappings() and parchment mapping using parchment-<minecraftVersion>:<parchmentVersion>@zip
  - java { withSourcesJar() }

- Platform projects configuration (rootProject.ext.platformProjects)
  - Apply: dev.architectury.loom, com.gradleup.shadow
  - loom: accessWidenerPath = root project's commonProject.loom.accessWidenerPath
  - jar: manifest attributes
    - MixinConnector: io.izzel.arclight.common.mod.ArclightConnector
    - Implementation-Title: Arclight
    - Implementation-Version: "<projectName>-<minecraftVersion>-<project.version>+<gitHash>"
    - Implementation-Vendor: Arclight Team
    - Implementation-Timestamp: current date (yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss)
  - components.java: withVariantsFromConfiguration(project.configurations.shadowRuntimeElements) { skip() }

- Jar packaging
  - jar.enabled = false

- Collect task
  - collect (Copy): destinationDir build/libs
  - from outputs of bootstrap jars: forgeJar, neoforgeJar, fabricJar

- Git branch helper
  - gitBranch(): runs git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD

- Upload task
  - uploadFiles (UploadFilesTask)
    - mcVersion: libs.versions.minecraft
    - version: "${project.version}-${project.ext.gitHash}"
    - snapshot: project.version endsWith('-SNAPSHOT')
    - gitHash: project.ext.gitHash
    - branch: gitBranch()
    - inputs.files: tasks.collect.outputs.files
    - dependsOn: tasks.collect

- Notes
  - Version and git hash are propagated into manifest and upload logic
  - Multiple platform variants rely on shared common project paths for bukkit.at and extra_mapping.tsrg

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM gradle:8.3-jdk21 AS builder

# Install extra tools just in case
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        git \
        curl \
        unzip \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy project files (order to leverage build cache)
COPY gradlew ./gradlew
COPY gradle ./gradle
COPY arclight-common arclight-common
COPY . .

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Initialize a git repository to satisfy Gradle scripts that expect a git repo
RUN git init \
    && git config user.name "builder" \
    && git config user.email "builder@example.com" \
    && git add -A \
    && git commit -m "initial commit" || true

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

EXPOSE 25565

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Stage 1: Builder - compile from source using Gradle wrapper
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jdk AS builder

# Install required tools for build (Git, curl, unzip, ca-certificates)
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        curl \
        unzip \
        git \
        ca-certificates \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the entire project into the builder
COPY . .

# Initialize a git repository to satisfy Gradle scripts that expect a git repo
RUN git init \
    && git config user.name "builder" \
    && git config user.email "builder@example.com" \
    && git add -A \
    && git commit -m "initial commit" || true

# Ensure wrapper is executable
RUN chmod +x gradlew

# Build the project from source using the wrapper
RUN ./gradlew clean build --no-daemon --stacktrace

# Stage 2: Runtime
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre-jammy AS runtime

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built artifacts from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/build/libs /app/libs

# Startup script to pick the jar and run it
RUN printf '%s\n' '#!/bin/sh' 'set -e' 'JAR=$(ls /app/libs/*.jar 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)' 'if [ -z "$JAR" ]; then' '  echo "No jar found in /app/libs"' '  exit 1' 'fi' 'exec java -jar "$JAR" nogui' > /app/start.sh \
    && chmod +x /app/start.sh

EXPOSE 25565

CMD ["/app/start.sh"]
"}
